Reno 911!: Miami (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,342,161Details
International Box Office $1,509,201
Worldwide Box Office $21,851,362
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $17,125,983
Total $17,125,983
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,273,477 (50.5% of total gross)
Legs:1.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,702 opening theaters/2,702 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,362,240

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 23rd, 2007 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: June 19th, 2007 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as Reno 911! - Miami
MPA Rating: R for sexual content, nudity, crude humor, language and drug use.
Running Time: 80 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos
Geographical setting: Miami
Plot point: Beat Cops, Terrorism
Social setting: Police life
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Double Feature Films, Jersey Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
